title: henningia capusii
intro: Henningia capusii, also known as the Capus' Henningia, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin infections. Henningia capusii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
